steps.title: Set up the linear equation
steps.content:
A member pays a one-time \$34 enrollment fee and \$16 per month. Let $m$ be the number of months. The total cost after $m$ months is:
$$34 + 16m = 178$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of months
steps.content:
Subtract 34 from both sides:
$$16m = 178 - 34 = 144$$

Divide both sides by 16:
$$m = \frac{144}{16} = 9$$

Therefore, a member will have been charged for 9 months.
